Linden, BL van der. 1960. Staphyleaceae. Flora Malesiana series 1, 6: 49-59

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 16 November 2024

species.citation: (Merr. & L.M.Perry) B.L.Linden , Fl. Males., 1st Ser. 6 (1960) 56; ≡ Turpinia montana var. borneensis Merr. & L.M.Perry , J. Arnold Arbor. 22 (1941) 553; Type: from Borneo.

Elmer , LPB 2 (1908) 490 ; Linden, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 6 (1960) 58; Coritico et al., J. Trop. Biol. & Cons. 19 (2022) 150. = Turpinia lucida Nakai , J. Arnold Arbor. 5 (1924) 80 ; Merrill, EPFP 4 (1926) 244. = Turpinia pachyphylla Merr. , PJS 27 (1925) 33 ; Merrill, EPFP 4 (1926) 252; Type: Loher 14463, Luzon: Rizal.
species.distribution: Malay Peninsula, Philippines. LUZON, MINDANAO: Davao del Sur, PALAWAN, SIBUYAN.

species.citation: (Roxb.) DC. , Prodr. (A. P. de Candolle) 2 (1825) 3 ; Linden, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 6 (1960) 58; ≡ Dalrympelea pomifera Roxb. , Pl. Coromandel 3 (1820) 76.
species.distribution: Bangladesh, China, India, Java, Laos, Myanmar, Nepal, New Guinea, Philippines, Sulawesi, Sumatra, Thailand, Vietnam. ?LUZON: ?Aurora (photos), MINDANAO: Bukidnon (photos), PALAWAN.

species.citation: Merr. , PJS 27 (1925) 34 ; Merrill, EPFP 4 (1926) 252; Linden, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 6 (1960) 55.

Hassk. , Flora 25(Beibl.) (1842) 42 ; Linden, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 6 (1960) 57; ≡ Dalrympelea sphaerocarpa (Hassk.) Nor-Ezzaw. , Gard. Bull. Singapore 62 (2010) 129; Type: from Java. = Turpinia sambucifolia Elmer , LPB 9 (1934) 3217.
species.distribution: Java, Lesser Sunda Isls, Malay Peninsula, Moluccas, Philippines, Singapore, Sulawesi, Sumatra. LUZON: Laguna (photos), Mountain Province (photos), Quezon (photos), MINDANAO: Bukidnon (photos), PALAWAN, PANAY (photos).
